rationale: Builds directly on the current best adaptive row-offset int8 path, but changes the late quant-aware behavior instead of trying another row-offset variant. The current script hard-roundtrips the full model every quant-aware interval, which can knock useful weights off-course abruptly. This version turns those late roundtrips into a ramped soft projection: each quant-aware pass blends quantized tensors partway toward their exact final roundtrip, then increases the mix on later passes, while the final pre-save roundtrip remains exact. That keeps the endgame targeted at final_int8_zlib_roundtrip_exact val_bpb while reducing projection shock. I also removed the unused warmup path to stay lean and under the line cap.
title: Soft Quant-Aware Projection Ramp
